Source URL: https://www.score.org/resources/

# SCORE Resource Library Overview and Filter Map

Last reviewed for BOSS Library ingestion: 2026-06-21

## BOSS Library tags
score, resource-library, filters, articles, templates, tools

## Resource purpose
Main SCORE resource library for articles, templates, tools, checklists, eGuides, podcasts, videos, and stage/topic/industry filtered resources.

## How the BOSS AI Librarian should use this resource
Use when the user needs specific written resources or when BOSS needs to search SCORE by lifecycle stage, topic, industry, entrepreneur type, language, or resource format.

## Best-fit BOSS lifecycle stage
All stages.

## Best audience
Entrepreneurs looking for articles, tools, templates, guides, checklists, videos, or podcasts.

## Key resources or subresources
- Resource formats: articles, checklists, eGuides, podcasts, templates, tools, videos.
- Core topic filters include accounting/finance, business plan, cash flow, customer service, cybersecurity, digital preparation and recovery, financial literacy, funding/loans, human resources, legal, management/operations, marketing, product development, strategy, tax planning, technology, websites, and work/life balance.
- Stage filters include Plan + Start, Manage + Grow, and Transition + Exit.
- Industry filters include food/beverage, nonprofit, professional services, real estate, retail, transportation, wellness/healthcare/home health, manufacturing, construction, and others.
- Entrepreneur-type filters include rural, solopreneur, veteran, young entrepreneur, and language filters include English and Spanish.

## Source notes captured for BOSS
- At review time, the SCORE resource library showed more than one thousand resources and broad filters by resource type, topic, stage, industry, entrepreneur type, and language.
- Counts change as SCORE adds/removes resources; BOSS should avoid hard-coding counts in user-facing answers unless recently verified.

## BOSS routing notes
- Use the resource library when a client asks for “resources” generally, but then narrow by BOSS stage and primary need.
- For early-stage clients, do not jump directly to legal/tax/entity pages unless concept and validation status warrant it.
- For legal/tax/compliance topics, treat SCORE as general education and route to qualified professionals for final decisions.

## Related SCORE links
- SCORE articles: https://www.score.org/articles/
- SCORE templates: https://www.score.org/templates/
- Small Business Resource Hubs: https://www.score.org/small-business-resource-hubs/
- Business education: https://www.score.org/business-education/

## Response pattern for BOSS
Use this resource as a routing destination, not as a substitute for professional legal, tax, lending, procurement, or compliance advice. For time-sensitive workshops, deadlines, prices, contact details, or eligibility rules, send the user to the live source URL first.
